title: More Nonsense Limerick 99
content:
There was an old man of Messina,
    Whose daughter was named Opsibeena;
    She wore a small wig, 
    And rode out on a pig,
    To the perfect delight of Messina.
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 99" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
